base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of residential_zones — a tile from 1989 simcity. Residential zones — low/medium/high-density houses at 3 upgrade tiers. 251×767. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
